    "HasA": [
      "それは基本的な構えと足運びを持っています。",
      "それはブロックと受け流しのテクニックを持っています。",
      "それは攻撃的な動きを持っています。",
      "それは形またはakaを通して教えられるテクニックを持っています。",
      "それはカウンター攻撃を持っています。",
      "それは攻撃目的で使用される頭、肩、肘、膝、足を持っています。",
      "それは近接戦闘を持っています。",
      "それは動物の動きに基づいた攻撃的な形を持っています。",
      "それは最高の形としてヒョウを持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは攻撃よりも防御を優先することによって特徴付けられます。",
      "それは相手に主導権を委ねることによって特徴付けられます。",
      "それはカウンター攻撃を開始する前に撤退することによって特徴付けられます。",

      "それは各パターンにおける動きと態度が模倣する動物によって特徴付けられることによって特徴付けられます。"

About: It is about a defensive unarmed martial art from Myanmar.
HasA: It has basic stances and footwork.
It has blocking and parrying techniques.
It has techniques taught through forms or aka.
It has head, shoulder, elbow, knee, and foot used for offensive purposes.
It has offensive forms based on the movements of animals.
It has the panther as the highest form.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by prioritizing defense over offense.
It is characterized by leaving the initiative to the opponent.
It is characterized by withdrawing before beginning the counter-strike.
It is characterized by animal movements in offensive forms.
It is characterized by the moves and attitude in each pattern being characterized by the animal which they imitate.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by animal styles from India and China.
IsA: It is a defensive unarmed martial art from Myanmar.
It is a Burmese martial art.
KnownAs: It is known as ဗန်တို.
MemberOf: It is a member of the International Thaing Bando Association.
It is a member of the Myanmar Thaing Federation.
UsedFor: It is used for offensive purposes.
UsedIn: It is used in contests.
It is used in free sparring.
It is used in close-quarter combat.
It is used in the United States.
It is used in Europe.
It is used in England.
It is used in the Liverpool area.
It is used in France.
It is used in Switzerland.
It is used in Spain.
UsedTo: It is used to protect themselves.
It is used to discourage aggression.
It is used to apply skills with care.
It is used to destroy the opponent's weapon.
It is used to end the conflict.
It is used to grasp underlying principles.
